title: Fix authentication timeout bug
description: Users are getting logged out after 5 minutes. The JWT refresh logic in AuthService isn't triggering. Check the token expiry handling and fix the refresh interval. Acceptance criteria: users stay logged in for at least 1 hour of activity, refresh token is called before expiry, add unit tests for the refresh logic.

title: Add user profile page
description: New page showing user settings, avatar, and preferences. Backend needs a GET/PUT /api/profile endpoint. Frontend needs a new ProfileComponent with form.

team.description: Add GET /api/profile and PUT /api/profile endpoints. Return/accept: { name: string, email: string, avatar_url: string, preferences: { theme: 'light' | 'dark', notifications: boolean } }. Add ProfileService with validation. Unit tests for service and controller. Ensure auth middleware protects both endpoints.

Add ProfileComponent at /profile route. Call GET /api/profile on load, PUT /api/profile on save. Form fields: name (text), email (text, readonly), avatar (file upload), theme (toggle), notifications (toggle). Use existing design system components. API contract: { name: string, email: string, avatar_url: string, preferences: { theme: 'light' | 'dark', notifications: boolean } }. Add component tests.

title: Improve dashboard load time
description: Dashboard takes 4+ seconds to load. Profile the API calls, add caching where appropriate, and lazy-load non-critical widgets. Target: under 1 second initial render.
